SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Interface LogicalPlan.Distinct

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, LogicalPlan
All Known Implementing Classes:
LogicalPlan.Distinct.All, LogicalPlan.Distinct.On
Enclosing interface:
LogicalPlan
public static sealed interface LogicalPlan.Distinct extends LogicalPlan permits LogicalPlan.Distinct.All, LogicalPlan.Distinct.On
Removes duplicate rows (SELECT DISTINCT).

This is a sealed sub-interface with two variants: LogicalPlan.Distinct.All for plain DISTINCT and LogicalPlan.Distinct.On for PostgreSQL-style DISTINCT ON.

See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: Distinct

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Distinct.All
    Plain DISTINCT referencing all selection expressions.
    static final record 
    LogicalPlan.Distinct.On
    PostgreSQL-style DISTINCT ON with separate control over DISTINCT'd and selected columns.
